mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuPriceHist :: selectById */ h.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , prd.prod_nm AS prod_nm FROM pdh_prod_sku_price_hist h LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = h.site_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = h.prod_id WHERE h.hist_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.ec.pd :: PdhProdSkuPriceHist :: selectPageCount */ FROM pdh_prod_sku_price_hist h
